---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for one of the Infinity Stack services
title: "[<service>] "
labels: enhancement
---

**Service affected**
`infinity-id` / `infinity-observe` / `infinity-data` / `infinity-stream` / stack-wide

**Is your feature request related to a problem?**
A clear description of the problem — e.g. "I can't do X without also running a separate tool."

**Describe the solution you'd like**
What you want to happen.

**Describe alternatives you've considered**
Other approaches or workarounds you've tried.

**Additional context**
Anything else — links, references, prior art in the SaaS product this service replaces.
